statement.latex: Let$S$be a nonabelian finite simple group, and$x$a nonidentity auto\-mor\-phism of~$S$. Let$(x)$be the smallest number of conjugates of$x$in$G= x, S$that generate$G$. The values of$(x)$had been studied in (R.\,Guralnick, J.\,Saxl, J. Algebra, 268, no.\,2 (2003), 519--571). [r]{(a)} (R.\,Guralnick, J.\,Saxl).
